message:
chore(cargo): regenerate Cargo.lock for fsqlite-mvcc → asupersync dep

Cargo.lock catchup: fsqlite-mvcc 0.1.2 upstream added a dependency on
asupersync (commit fc55935d over in the frankensqlite tree:
"fix(mvcc): move silo epoch advancer onto asupersync"). Our pinned
version pulled that change via cargo update, so the local lockfile
gained the asupersync entry under the fsqlite-mvcc package section.

Single-line addition, no direct dependency changes in our Cargo.toml.
